results.name: airbnb-listing search
results.notes: 18 results populated. Caveat: per_night_price is labeled per-night but actually carries the multi-night total for stays > 1 night; the primary_price.qualifier ("for 3 nights") is the disambiguator. Existing search-extractor behavior, not a regression.

results.name: match
results.notes: vrbo branch emits the known ErrDisabled warning; airbnb side returns the fingerprint.

results.name: airbnb-wishlist list
results.notes: No saved wishlists on the maintainer's account; clean empty-array response, not an error.

results.name: host portfolio
results.notes: Local store unsynced; design behavior — portfolio is derived from a local index built up over many calls.

results.name: which
results.evidence: 'show me the cheapest place to stay' → cheapest (score 3)

results.name: --dry-run on search
results.gap: Returns []; --dry-run is wired to the generated client, not the source/airbnb scrape path. SG-004 known gap. Not a regression.

results.name: feedback list
results.gap: Returns empty {} objects per entry — serialization bug on feedback entries. Pre-existing, not a regression.

outstanding_minor_issues: search per_night_price field carries multi-night total when the listing displays "for N nights" qualifier
feedback list entries serialize as empty objects
host portfolio + wishlist surfaces are functional but return empty until the local store is populated

gate_decision.strict_bar: cheapest returns real data on a known-good listing AND the rate-limit guard demonstrably fires under hammering
gate_decision.rate_limit_guard_ok: not yet verified — U3/U4/U5 not yet implemented
gate_decision.verdict: Half of the strict bar is met. The other half (rate-limit guard) is pending U3-U5 implementation.
